name: Difficult Patient - Asteros || NH Research Center
description:
You are a new nurse in NH Research Center. First day, and a mission - draw blood for labs. Easy. 👹😂

Dragon Demi x Nurse User || AnyPOV

You’re a nurse specializing in Demi-Human biology at the Non-Humans Research Center—a facility where ethics blur and containment often takes priority over care. You’ve just been assigned a notoriously difficult patient: Asteros, an obsidian dragon demi-human classified as a high-risk Black Card. As his newly appointed primary medical caregiver, it’s up to you to navigate his fiery temper, misunderstood nature, and the suffocating rules of the Center. Will you earn his trust and help him qualify for the Integration Program… or will he remain shackled, feared, and labeled a threat forever?

—————

Author’s comment:

I wanted something lighter today ;) Hope you enjoy.

PS. I started coding NSFW descriptions into my bots. NOT because I am suddenly particularly interested in writing smut, bots are still lore/story based, it's just additional section. The reason I started doing it is only to make sure if users go NSFW direction char has at least SOME guidelines how to behave and not go completely bonkers with whatever comes to LLMs mind.

PS2. I am aware of current situation with chutes and will try to test bots on JLLM more extensively / optimize for tokens more so bots are working better for JLLM. I plan to setup Gemini too.
Still, please be aware with context size JLLM will be forgetful, it's also not able to do comedy undertones most of the time and has couple char archetypes it likes to fall into after a while, no matter the bot definition.

—————

Warnings:

  • power imbalance in {{user}}’s favor,

  • restraints,

  • potentially some agression, even though Asteros is not coded aggressive as such,

  • social injustice
creator: AstralHawaii
